prompt: Write the pricing-page A/B test variant D for openpatent.ai where the $149 defensive tier is the visual anchor (middle-of-funnel). Render the 5-tier ladder in this order with the $149 tier enlarged: (1) $29 starter — left rail, '1 disclosure/quarter, Bitcoin OTS', (2) $149 defensive — center, enlarged, '10 disclosures, C2PA manifest, hash-chained audit, 6-layer proof', (3) $999 full — right rail, 'unlimited disclosures, BFT council review', (4) $2499 premium — top-left callout, 'cross-hive attestation, MCP 33-tool, white-label .ai', (5) $4999/mo enterprise — top-right callout, 'sovereign air-gap, FedRAMP path, named partner'. Lead with the $149 tier and a single-CRO CTA ('Disclose for $149 — 90 seconds, 10-minute Bitcoin proof'). Justify the order in 1 paragraph: 'defensive-middle is the optimal price-anchor: low enough for solo-inventor self-serve, high enough to feel like a real filing, and flanked by the $29 starter (insurance) and the $999 full (sovereign temple) on either side.' Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {tier_order:[5 strings], lead_paragraph:string, signup_cta:string, hypothesis:string, signature:string}.
